name: Harshita Gupta

education.institution: FORE School of Management, New Delhi
Kirori Mal College, University of Delhi

institution: FORE School of Management, New Delhi

experience.company: HDFC Bank Ltd. – Data & Analytics COE
experience.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Built and maintained a self-serve BI platform (Tableau + Redshift + dbt) enabling 400+ business users to access real-time banking KPIs without analyst intervention.
Developed credit card portfolio analytics model tracking ₹28,000 Crore in receivables across 12 customer segments.
Designed customer lifetime value (CLV) model using Python (scikit-learn), identifying top-decile customers contributing 62% of revenue.
Implemented automated data quality framework with 200+ DQ checks, reducing reporting errors by 91%.
Presented monthly analytics insights directly to VP Analytics and CFO; authored 4 internal white papers on customer behaviour patterns.
Reduced Redshift query costs by 35% through query optimization and materialized views implementation.

experience.title: Data Analytics Consultant (intern)
responsibilities: Supported IFRS 9 provisioning model validation project for a public sector bank.
Built Tableau workbooks for risk dashboard showing NPAs, LGD, and PD metrics.
Automated 3 Excel-based reports using Python — saving 6 hours weekly.

companies: HDFC Bank Ltd. – Data & Analytics COE

projects.name: OpenFinMetrics – Financial KPI Dashboard Template
projects.description: Open-source Tableau dashboard template for banking analytics — NPA tracking, CASA ratio, credit cost. 200+ downloads on Tableau Public. Featured in Tableau Community blog.

projects.name: CLV Predictor – Customer Lifetime Value Model
projects.description: ML model predicting 12-month customer lifetime value for subscription businesses. Deployed as Streamlit app. Kaggle kernel with 1,200 votes.

achievements: HDFC Bank Analytics Excellence Award 2023 (recognition from CHRO)
Top Rated Tableau Public Author – 18,000 total views across published workbooks
Selected for Data Leadership Program (DLP) at HDFC – cohort of 10/1,200 analysts
interests: Teaching (Teaches data analysis to NGO students on weekends)
